---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. What are you trying to do that isn't possible today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can — screenshots or mockups are very welcome.

## Alternatives you've considered

Have you worked around this in another way? Is there an existing feature that partially covers this?

## Additional context

Anything else that might be helpful — links, related issues, etc.
